title: Kilrock Rhino 1 Litre Heavy Duty Drain & Toilet Unblocker High Strength
features: High strength industrial product for toilets and drains
Fat and grease, hair & soap. Food residue, limescale, toilet paper"
description: Product description Drain Unblocker -1 Litre RHINO High strength industrial product for toilets & drains Bulldozes through pretty much everything Grease & fat,hair & soap.food waste,limescale,toilet paper Handling precautions Keep the bottle upright and the cap screwed on tightly during transportation and storage NEVER mix with other chemicals, e.g. after an unsuccessful attemp to clear a blockage with another product. This can cause a violent chemical reaction. NEVER use a plunger during or after use of this product. Use in a well ventilated area.Avoid breathing in fumes when using. Take precautions against spillage.To open bottle,place upright on an even surface,push down cap and unscrew. Pour slowly in single doses no larger than 250ml.Leave 15 minutes and flush through with water after each dose. Do not use in septic tanks,toilets with macerator pump or waste disposals.Do not use on shallow bath and shower traps as overflow may cause staining to fittings. Do not use on lead piping. Avoid product coming into contact with chrome,acrylic(e.g. baths,sinks) stainless steel,vitreous enamel,gold or aluminium as this may cause irreversible discoloration or etching. Directions Remove the bottle from its packaging. Keep the bottle upright and the cap screwed on tightly during transportation and storage. NEVER mix with other chemicals. NEVER use a plunger during or after use of this product. Use in a well ventilated area. Avoid breathing in fumes when using. Take precautions against spillage. To open bottle, place upright on an even surface, push down cap and unscrew. Pour slowly in single doses no larger than 250ml. Leave 15 minutes and flush through with water after each dose. Do not use in septic tanks, toilets with macerator pump or waste disposals. Do not use on shallow bath and shower traps as overflow may cause staining to fittings. Do not use on lead piping. Avoid product coming into contact with chrome, acrylic(e.g. baths, sinks) stainless steel, vitreous enamel, gold or aluminium as this may cause irreversible discoloration or etching. Safety Warning Keep the bottle upright and the cap screwed on tightly during transportation and storage. NEVER mix with other chemicals. Use in a well ventilated area. See more
